rows.label: qev030502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yes, yes, this is Aunt
Helen, na. Is that... [ST:playername ]? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I see, so you found Quega's body.
In that case, feed it to a beast... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Before you feed him... right. Isn't
there anything around there that
could serve as a keepsake? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0004
rows.name:
If there's something that could make her
feel Quega close to her, even a little...
we could give it to Thea, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_JNK0010
rows.name: Examine[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_SEL0011
rows.name:
Search Quega's body to see if there is
anything that could serve as a keepsake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_JNK0020
rows.name: Look Around[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_SEL0021
rows.name:
Look around the area to see if anything
related to Quega has dropped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Eh? You found a strange note?
What on earth does it say, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0006
rows.name:
"I hid... a... for Thea... in the
cave of the Dryland Cave Fortress...
Someone... give it to Thea..." [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0007
rows.name:
...You said? What on earth was that
guy Quega trying to give to Thea...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm... I'm curious, ne... Hey, I
feel bad giving you more work, but
could you go look for that too? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0009
rows.name:
It might just turn out to be a
good gift to cheer Thea up. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_SEL0031
rows.name: Accept Helen's request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_SEL0041
rows.name: Refuse Helen's request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0010
rows.name:
That's a BLADE for you, na!
I'll leave it to you, then. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Hmm, I couldn't quite
hear what you said, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0012
rows.name:
Please. I'm a fan of Thea's dancing, na.
I want her to get better no matter what,
and have her dance one more time. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0013
rows.name: ...Na? Na? I'll leave it to you, then. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah... regarding the original job,
you're going to need bait to get an
extraordinary beast to eat Quega. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0015
rows.name:
So, I want you to get some Bone-in Thigh
Meat that the native creatures around there
love, and set it down next to the body. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm sorry for asking so much of
you, na, but I know you can do
it! I'm leaving it to you! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hello! It's Aunt Helen, na! How
is it, did you manage to get
the Bone-in Thigh Meat, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Yes, yes, that's it. Now set it down
by his body and lure out a beast, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0019
rows.name:
Good! Now all you have to do is wait,
na! Hide in the shadows and make sure
you watch Quega get eaten properly. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Sorry to bother you again, na! I
contacted you because there was
something I forgot to tell you, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0021
rows.name:
Listen, na. The beasts around there all
have incredibly good hearing, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you make even a little noise, they'll get
angry and attack you, na! You have to stay
perfectly still when the beast comes, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Eh? You're busy right
now? Sorry about that, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030502_MSG0024
rows.name:
Well, just do your best, na! Auntie
is praying for your safety! [ST:wait ]
